R

rb - Static variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.EmailUtility
Resource bundle containing basic system-wide mail environment properties.
rb - Static variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.JDBCDataSource
Resource configuration bundle pulling database property attributes from system configuration files.
rb - Static variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.PropertyReader
Resource bundle instance linked directly to the application system configuration file.
RecordNotFoundException - Exception in in.co.rays.proj4.exception
RecordNotFoundException is a checked exception thrown when a data retrieval or lookup operation fails to find a matching persistent row or record for the requested criteria within the datastore.
RecordNotFoundException(String) - Constructor for exception in.co.rays.proj4.exception.RecordNotFoundException
Constructs a new RecordNotFoundException with the specified detailed error message.
redirect(String, HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.ServletUtility
Redirects the client response to an entirely new URL location.
registerUser(UserBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.UserModel
Registers a new user and sends email.
ROLE_CTL - Static variable in interface in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ORSView
Context binding mapping the security Access Role controller servlet.
ROLE_LIST_CTL - Static variable in interface in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ORSView
Context binding mapping the security Access Role listing collector servlet.
ROLE_LIST_VIEW - Static variable in interface in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ORSView
Path definition tracking security Access Role listing view.
ROLE_VIEW - Static variable in interface in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ORSView
Path definition tracking security Access Role management view.
